summary: BUILD_BLUEPRINT.md created at workspace root: 1,432 lines, 20 numbered sections (all validated against ToC), 63 subsections, 78 fenced code blocks, 3 appendices (Colour Palette, Glossary, Future Expansion). Covers: toolchain lock, full directory map, package inventory, TypeScript data model with factory, state architecture with XState-style enum, Expo Router route table, 5 screen specs with ASCII diagrams, 6 component prop interfaces, animation state machine (11 phases with ms timings), gesture pipeline with full useHandleGesture code, weighted randomiser engine, 6-sound + 5-haptic trigger tables, storage CRUD API, 9:16 export pipeline, 15-asset manifest, 38-task 5-phase build order with hour estimates, 7 per-file implementation notes, testing strategy with device matrix, 9-metric performance budget, and 9-entry risk register.
